Description: Smoke Authentication Test Suite - Critical 13 Tests
Verify successful login with valid credentials
Verify login fails with invalid email
Verify login fails with incorrect password
Verify login fails with empty fields
Verify that login rejects invalid email format (no @ symbol)
Verify that all required UI elements are present on the Login page
Verify that password input fields are masked (type=password) on Login and Register pages
Verify logout functionality clears session and redirects to login page
Verify successful user registration with valid data
Verify successful developer registration with valid data
Verify registration fails with duplicate email
Verify reset link sent for valid email
Verify password reset fails with invalid token
